apex.ai_summary: Initial access via rce → execution chain: initial access → execution → persistence → defense evasion → malware behaviors: registry persistence, network c2, file system abuse
apex.recommended_action: Risk 10.0/10 — 177 IOCs extracted

description: From cause to cash: a cross-border look at hacktivist activity
